text:
sincere heart and unflinching faith in God and statements of great
sages of yore, entertain no doubt whatsoever in their minds about
the veracity of the influence of planets on terrestrial beings as
well as of auguries, whose correctness they have tested by
observation and personal experience. In astrology the Zodiacal
belt is considered as the Body of Time or Kala-Purusa. which is
divided into twelve Signs or Rasis. which in turn contain27 (or 28)
constellations that are divided equally among the twelve Signs at
the rate of Two and a Quarter stars or nine quarter -, per sign of
30 degrees. The Circle of constellations is said to be stationary
and to have an independent status. Hence this Circle of stars too
is regarded as a separate Deity known as Naksatra-Purusa or

WHAT IS PANCANGA ? 293
Stellar Deity, and worshipped. As the description of Gods is done
from foot upwards, we have to start with the Feet of the Stellar
Deity. The asterism Mula represents its Feet; Rohini—Shanks;
